days.label: Week 1 - Day 1 Accumulation
warmup: Adductor rock back x10 each side
PVC lat stretch x60s split into 6x10s holds
Knee to wall glides x20 each leg

blocks.name: Bottom up front squat
blocks.notes: Based off Clean 1RM. 5 second eccentric on each rep. Can be changed to 5s pause front squat if equipment does not allow bottom up front squats.

blocks.name: Front squat
blocks.notes: Based off front squat 1RM. Rest up to 120s between sets.

blocks.name: Quarter front squat
blocks.notes: Based off back squat 1RM. 3 second eccentric on each rep. Rest up to 120s between sets.

days.label: Phase 3 rest-pause 6+4
warmup: 5 single arm ring rows each arm

blocks.name: Neutral grip pull up
blocks.notes: Build to a weight you can hit for 6-7 reps. Then 2 rest-pause sets: perform 6 reps, rest 15-20s, perform 4 more reps. Rest 2-3 min between sets. Tempo 3010.

sets.description: Straight set - build to a 6-7 rep weight

blocks.name: Chest supported neutral grip DB row
blocks.notes: Build to a weight you can hit for 6-7 reps, then 2 rest-pause sets. Rest 2-3 min between sets. Tempo 3010.

sets.description: Straight set - build to a 6-7 rep weight

blocks.name: Wide grip barbell row
blocks.notes: 3 working sets, tempo 3010 (3s eccentric, 0s pause at stretch, 1s up, 0s pause at top). Rest 60s between sets.

blocks.name: Reverse DB fly
blocks.notes: 60s on / 60s off x3. In 60s perform as many quality reps as possible.
